phase-plan.purpose: Verify the full Space Explorer chat authoring loop from conversation to mutations to canonical assets to bundle serialization artifacts.
phase-plan.scope: In scope: verification checklist, local technical checks, release-readiness notes. Out of scope: unrelated phase work.

task.description: Run static verification (typecheck) and confirm all chat mutation codepaths compile.
Document manual browser verification script for chat->mutation->bundle flow.

dod.criterion: Chat modal opens from floating widget in Space Explorer.
Chat can propose and apply model/stat/schema operations with validation output.
Chat can create/update canonical assets and reflect content bindings.
Chat can trigger bundle serialization and optionally download bundle/manifest.

suggestion.gap: No formal acceptance script currently exists for manual verification of chat-authoring flow.
suggestion.proposal: Add a release checklist requirement with explicit prompts and expected operation/apply outcomes.
